options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <x1> # X1 (float, required) <y1> # Y1 (float, required) <x2> # X2 (float, required) <y2> # Y2 (float, required) <ptnPinObj> # name of the net, net group, or pin group associated with this pin guide (string, required) <layerID> # metal layer(s) for the pin guide (string, required) <space> # Spacing (float, required) <cellName> # name of the cell with which the pin group is associated
